name: Scheduled Dates calendar – Bulk assign tasks to an operator
precondition: User is logged in with calendar access; calendar redesign feature flag is enabled; Scheduled Dates calendar is available with at least two tasks visible.
objective: Validate bulk assignment flow from the Scheduled Dates calendar, including selection state and assignment result.

steps.step: Open the Scheduled Dates calendar view.
steps.expectedResult: Scheduled Dates calendar is displayed with task items on the calendar grid.

steps.step: Verify the “Bulk Assign” button with no tasks selected.
steps.expectedResult: “Bulk Assign” button is disabled.

steps.step: Select multiple tasks on the calendar.
steps.expectedResult: Selection count updates and the “Bulk Assign” button becomes enabled.

steps.step: Click “Bulk Assign”.
steps.expectedResult: “Bulk Assign Tasks” modal opens with an operator dropdown.

steps.step: Select an operator from the dropdown.
steps.expectedResult: Selected operator is shown in the field and the “Bulk Assign” button is enabled.

steps.step: Click “Bulk Assign” in the modal.
steps.expectedResult: Success feedback is shown, modal closes, and the selected tasks display Operator A as the assignee (overwriting any previous assignee).

name: Due Dates calendar – Bulk assign tasks to an operator
precondition: User is logged in with calendar access; calendar redesign feature flag is enabled; Due Dates calendar is available with at least two tasks visible.
objective: Validate bulk assignment flow from the Due Dates calendar.

steps.step: Open the Due Dates calendar view.
steps.expectedResult: Due Dates calendar is displayed with task items on the calendar grid.

steps.step: Select multiple tasks on the calendar.
steps.expectedResult: Selection count updates and the “Bulk Assign” button becomes enabled.

steps.step: Click “Bulk Assign”.
steps.expectedResult: “Bulk Assign Tasks” modal opens with an operator dropdown.

steps.step: Select an operator and click “Bulk Assign”.
steps.expectedResult: Success feedback is shown, modal closes, and the selected tasks display Operator B as the assignee.

name: Bulk Assign Tasks modal – Static text and labels
precondition: User is logged in with calendar access; calendar redesign feature flag is enabled; Scheduled Dates and Due Dates calendars are available with tasks visible.
objective: Validate static texts, labels, and button captions in the Bulk Assign Tasks modal for both calendar views.

steps.step: From the Scheduled Dates calendar, select multiple tasks and open “Bulk Assign”.
steps.expectedResult: Modal title displays “Bulk Assign Tasks”.

steps.step: Verify the helper text under the title.
steps.expectedResult: Helper text shows “Select an operator to bulk assign these [N] Tasks to” with the selected task count.

steps.step: Verify the note text in the modal.
steps.expectedResult: Note displays “Note: Bulk assigning tasks will overwrite any existing assignees”.

steps.step: Verify the operator field label and placeholder.
steps.expectedResult: Label displays “Select an operator” and the placeholder displays “Select one”.

steps.step: Verify the modal buttons.
steps.expectedResult: Buttons display “Cancel” and “Bulk Assign”.

steps.step: Open the modal from the Due Dates calendar and verify the same texts.
steps.expectedResult: Title, helper text, note, labels, placeholders, and button captions match the Scheduled Dates modal.

name: Scheduled Dates calendar – Bulk Assign Tasks modal UI layout
precondition: User is logged in with calendar access; calendar redesign feature flag is enabled; Scheduled Dates calendar is available with tasks visible.
objective: Validate modal layout and control placement across responsive breakpoints when opened from the Scheduled Dates calendar.

steps.step: Open the Bulk Assign Tasks modal at XL viewport (1920px).
steps.expectedResult: Modal is centered; title and close icon are aligned on the header row; dropdown spans the field width; “Cancel” and “Bulk Assign” buttons are right-aligned with consistent spacing; no overlap or clipping.

steps.step: Resize viewport to L (1280px).
steps.expectedResult: Modal remains centered with all text and controls visible; dropdown and buttons keep alignment and spacing; no horizontal scroll.

steps.step: Resize viewport to M (1024px).
steps.expectedResult: Modal adapts without content overlap; header, dropdown, and action buttons remain visible and aligned.

steps.step: Resize viewport to S (768px).
steps.expectedResult: Modal scales to fit the viewport; content remains readable; action buttons remain visible without overlap.
